title: Browse the tree as a static page
description: A project owner opens a static browsable page of the whole RCF tree locally, with each document shown as readable text and inter-document links navigating between sections.
iWant: a browsable static page of the whole tree that I can open locally
soThat: I can read each document's content and follow its links without a server or a JSON viewer

acceptanceCriteria.description: The page is produced as static files that open in a browser with no server process
acceptanceCriteria.then: it writes static files that open in a browser with no server process

acceptanceCriteria.description: Each document's key fields are rendered as readable text, not raw JSON
acceptanceCriteria.then: its key fields are rendered as readable text, not raw JSON
the link navigates to that document's section
